title: Hook Gate Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating YAML-based permission and safety gates used by Claude Code hook framework

name.description: Unique identifier for the gate in kebab-case

description.description: Human-readable purpose and explanation of the gate
examples: Prevent mix ecto.create/drop/reset without explicit approval
Enforce Rule 4: .md files must live under /docs

hook.description: Hook event that triggers this gate

matcher.description: Regex pattern for matching tool names or wildcard '*' for all tools

condition.description: Bash code executed to determine if gate triggers (exit 0 = trigger, exit 1 = no trigger)

decision.description: Decision made by Claude Code when gate triggers

message.description: User-facing message explaining why the gate triggered and what decision was made
examples: Rule 2: Destructive DB command requires explicit confirmation
Rule 4: .md files must live under /docs (exceptions: CLAUDE.md, README.md, directory claude.md)

tags.description: Searchable categories and keywords for organizing gates

severity.description: Risk level for sorting and prioritizing gates

version.description: Gate version for compatibility tracking and updates

author.description: Email or name of the person who wrote this gate
